nasb.text: His own iniquities will capture the wicked, And he will be held with the cords of his sin.

esv.text: The iniquities of the wicked ensnare him, and he is held fast in the cords of his sin.

cnv.text: 惡人必被自己的罪孽捉住， 他必被自己罪惡的繩索纏住。

ccb.text: 恶人被自己的罪恶捉住， 被自己的罪恶捆绑。

csbs.text: 恶人被自己的罪孽捉住， 被自己罪的绳索捆绑；
